violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. Last date of sale was lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Stuffing was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep and covered. Cooling methods reviewed with person in charge. Food was moved to shallow pans to properly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged tuna was observed thawing with the package in-tact. Tuna was observed at 33 degrees Fahrenheit and removed from the package. ROP seafood must be removed from packaging upon thawing to allow for proper oxygen exchange. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per PIC, they are enrolled in a food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

Shellstock (Quahogs) located in walk-in cooler did not have the proper identification tags. Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the shellstock are received until the container is empty. PIC placed tags in shellstock bag at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information. The date of the sale of the last shellstock were lacking. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC moved items to warewashing area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

Red and white sauce packaged in the food establishment are lacking the proper labels with a list of ingredients. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
